title: WorkflowDefinition
description: Protocol-owned reviewed workflow surface for process selection, packaging identity, and policy binding over reviewed process graphs.

schema_id.description: Stable protocol object-family identifier for workflow definition objects.

schema_version.description: Exact protocol schema version used to validate this workflow definition.

workflow_id.description: Stable reviewed workflow identity referenced by compiled run plans.

workflow_version.description: Reviewed workflow-facing packaging version; separate from executable process graph versions.

selected_process_id.description: Reviewed process identity selected by this workflow definition for compilation.

reviewed_process_ids.description: Reviewed process identities this workflow definition is authorized to select from.

policy_binding_id.description: Optional reviewed policy binding identity associated with this workflow definition.

approval_profile.description: Shared formal approval-frequency input bound to workflow selection; remains distinct from autonomy posture.

autonomy_posture.description: Shared operator-guidance/continuation posture input bound to workflow selection; remains distinct from approval profile.
